architecture_intent: Three-tier web application with VPC, Application Load Balancer, Lambda functions as backend, and DynamoDB for data storage
Serverless REST API with API Gateway, Lambda function, and DynamoDB table with CRUD operations
Static website hosting with S3 bucket and CloudFront distribution
Event-driven data processing pipeline with SQS queue, SNS topic, and Lambda function processor
VPC network infrastructure with public and private subnets, NAT gateway, and security groups for web and application tiers
Containerized microservice with ECS Fargate cluster, network load balanced service, and VPC
Scheduled Lambda function triggered by EventBridge cron rule for periodic data processing
EC2 instance in a VPC with IAM role for Systems Manager access and security group allowing HTTP traffic
Serverless backend with Cognito user pool authentication, API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, and S3 bucket
Multi-region S3 replication setup with source and destination buckets, versioning enabled, and lifecycle policies
Real-time data streaming with Kinesis Data Stream, Lambda consumer, and DynamoDB for state storage
CloudWatch monitoring stack with alarms on Lambda errors, SNS notification topic, and dashboard
